donate_interface-desc: Donation landing page that integrates gateway extensions
donate_interface-charge-monthly-only: We will only do a monthly recurring charge
donate_interface-sepa-mandate: By clicking Donate you authorise the Wikimedia Foundation and its payment processor, Adyen, to debit your account via SEPA Direct Debit. You can cancel within 8 weeks.
donate_interface-sepa-mandate-monthly: By clicking Donate you authorise the Wikimedia Foundation and its payment processor, Adyen, to debit your account via SEPA Direct Debit each month. You can cancel within 8 weeks.
donate_interface-sepa-mandate-yearly: By clicking Donate you authorise the Wikimedia Foundation and its payment processor, Adyen, to debit your account via SEPA Direct Debit each year. You can cancel within 8 weeks.
donate_interface-amount-error: Please select an amount to donate
donate_interface-bigamount-error: We cannot accept donations greater than USD $4 ($1 $2) through our website. Please contact our major gifts staff at $3.
donate_interface-partner-with-trustly: Wikimedia partners with Trustly to provide you with a safe and secure bank sign in experience. Skip card or routing/account entries, just sign in with your bank credentials
donate_interface-processing-error: There has been an error processing your request. Please contact Donor Services at $1.
donate_interface-ach-invalid-account-num: Must have 4-17 numbers and no spaces
donate_interface-ach-invalid-routing-num: Must have 9 numbers and no spaces
donate_interface-fallback-currency-notic: Your currency was unsupported. Processing will take place using $1, if you decide to continue.
donate_interface-maintenance-notice: We apologize, but this type of payment has been temporarily disabled.
donate_interface-donor-employer-explain: We'll let you know if your employer will match your gift
donate_interface-donor-auth_ach: I authorize Wikimedia Foundation to electronically debit my account in the amount of $1 $2 on the agreed upon schedule. I understand that a recovery fee may be charged if the payment is dishonored or returned for any reason and that it is my responsibility to retain a copy of this authorization for my records.
donate_interface-donor-fiscal_number-exp: Our payment processor is requested by the Reserve Bank of India to collect your PAN, but we do not store this information. Please optionally provide your PAN here.
donate_interface-donor-phone-explain-in: This is optional and we do not store it. If left blank, our payment processor may generate a random placeholder on the next screen.
donate_interface-donor-sms_opt_in: I would like to receive text messages such as donation appeals from Wikimedia at the number I have provided.
donate_interface-donor-opt_in_yes: Yes! Please send me infrequent email updates and information on how I can support Wikipedia in the future.*
donate_interface-donor-opt_in_no: No, I don’t want updates, even if it’s only a few emails a year.
donate_interface-donor-opt_in_explain: *Your information is handled in accordance with our Donor Privacy Policy. Each email you receive will include easy unsubscribe options.
donate_interface-donor-opt_in_explain_00: Each email you receive will include an easy unsubscribe option. Your information is handled in accordance with our donor privacy policy.
donate_interface-error-msg-general: There was an error processing your request.
donate_interface-pending-success-msg: Thank you for your support! We are currently processing your donation. If the donation is processed successfully you will typically receive a donation receipt within 30 minutes.
donate_interface-pending-failure-msg: If you do not receive a donation receipt, contact our team at $1 and reference transaction number $2 and we will be happy to assist.

Please try a different card or one of our other ways to give, or contact us at $2

php-response-declined: Your transaction could not be accepted.
donate_interface-cvv-explain:
What is CVV?

Cardholder Verification Value (CVV): These three or four digit numbers help ensure that the physical card is in the cardholder's possession. This helps to prevent unauthorized or fraudulent use.

Visa, Mastercard

The 3-digit code is located on the back of your card, inside the signature area. Typically the signature panel will have a series of numbers, but only the last three digits make up the CVV code.

American Express

The code is always located above the embossed (raised) account number on the face of the card. In some instances, the code is located on the left side of the card, but is always above the account number.

donate_interface-token-mismatch: Your session has expired. Please try reloading the page and submitting the form again.

It appears that you do not have JavaScript enabled, or your browser does not support it.
In order to provide a safe, secure and pleasant experience, our donation form requires JavaScript.
donate_interface-noscript-redirect-msg: If you cannot or do not wish to enable JavaScript, you may still contribute by visiting:
donate_interface-monthly-only-credit: We only accept credit cards (not debit cards) for monthly donations.
donate_interface-email-unsub-success: You have successfully been removed from our mailing list
donate_interface-email-unsub-delay: Please allow up to four (4) days for the changes to take effect. We apologize for any emails you receive during this time. If you have any questions, please contact $1
donate_interface-email-unsub-fail: There was an error processing your request, please contact $1.
donate_interface-email-unsub-confirm: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe $1?
donate_interface-email-paypal-donor-no-e: Your recurring donation is processed via PayPal, so if you wish to change your email address, you will need to update your email address directly through your PayPal account. Please contact our donor relations team at $1 if you have any questions regarding updating your contact information.
donate_interface-email-primary-confirm: You have successfully confirmed your email address as $1.
donate_interface-email-primary-confirm-e: Something went wrong while confirming your email address. Please try again later.
donate_interface-email-explain: We will email you a receipt to confirm your donation.
donate_interface-email-optin-fail: There was an error processing your request. Please contact $1 or click here to try again.
donate_interface-informationsharing: We do not sell or trade your information to anyone. By donating, you agree to share your personal information with the Wikimedia Foundation, the nonprofit organization that hosts Wikipedia and other Wikimedia projects, and its service providers pursuant to our donor policy. Wikimedia Foundation and its service providers are located in the United States and in other countries whose privacy laws may not be equivalent to your own. For more information please read our donor policy.
donate_interface-taxded-msg-x: The Wikimedia Foundation is an international non-profit organization that supports local and independent associations around the world. Our tax-exempt status varies according to the laws of each country. Donations to the Wikimedia Foundation are not tax-deductible in $1. If you have any questions about tax exemptions or deductions, we invite you to contact $3.
donate_interface-monthly-cancel: Monthly donations will be debited on the same date each month as your first gift, until canceled. Donations made on the 29th, 30th, or 31st will be charged on the last day of shorter months. Yearly recurring donations will be debited on the anniversary of the first gift. For questions, please contact $1.
donate_interface-error-http-403: You do not have permission to access this page.
donate_interface-photo-license: All images are licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike 4.0 International license.
donate_interface-emailpreferences-thank-: Thank you for confirming your email address.
We look forward to staying in touch with you!
donate_interface-monthly-convert-title: Add a monthly donation starting next month?
donate_interface-monthly-convert-title-a: Add a recurring donation starting in the future?
donate_interface-monthly-convert-title-v: Thank you for your donation. Want to increase your impact with a monthly donation, starting next month?
You just donated . Thank you. Would you consider adding a monthly donation, starting next month?
, thank you for your gift. Want to increase your impact with a monthly donation, starting next month?
If you can, please add a monthly donation starting next month.
donate_interface-monthly-convert-text: Monthly support is the best way to ensure that Wikipedia keeps thriving.
donate_interface-monthly-convert-text-an: Regular support is the best way to ensure that Wikipedia keeps thriving.
donate_interface-monthly-convert-text-va: Only a tiny number of our donors give monthly, but it's the best way to ensure that Wikipedia keeps thriving.
We'll be honest: knowledge isn't a one-time cure, it's a long term commitment. Can you turn your support into a monthly donation?

Thank you for your gift. We have to ask: are you able to do a bit more? Only a fraction of all our readers make it to this point, because most don't donate. And of all our donors, only a small portion consider an automatic monthly gift. But monthly support is the best way to ensure that Wikipedia keeps thriving. Will you help ensure our financial stability with a sustaining donation?
donate_interface-monthly-convert-change-: Yes, I'll donate monthly, but for a different amount
Sure, let me choose how much
donate_interface-monthly-convert-enter-a: Enter your monthly donation amount to begin next month.
donate_interface-monthly-convert-set-up-: Set up a monthly donation of
Set up a yearly donation of

donate_interface-monthly-convert-yes-but: Sure, I’ll make it yearly
Sure, I’ll add monthly starting next month
donate_interface-monthly-convert-no-let-: Sure, but let me choose a different amount
donate_interface-monthly-convert-yes-but: Yes, I'll add a monthly donation
